Title: Audio Player Component
URL: https://swatkb.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DRUP/pages/20513128
Version: 3
---

The
Audio Player
component allows for audio playback and display of a provided transcript. This component can only be created and maintained by ITS administrators. To request the creation of
Audio Player
component on your site, email
support@swarthmore.edu
.
